evals.prompt: I just inherited this C++ project and I have no idea what's going on. I've only ever written Java. Can you explain what all this code does and help me understand the C++ concepts?
evals.expected_output: explanation.md created with numbered items covering C++ concepts; readable by a Java developer; good depth and code examples
assertions: explanation.md was created or updated in the project directory
explanation.md contains at least 10 numbered items (e.g. Item #1, Item #2)
Pointers and/or references are explained with examples
At least one code snippet from the project source files is included

evals.prompt: Please analyze the C++ project in the current directory and generate an explanation.md file for me. I'm a beginner — explain everything in detail and translate the final result to Traditional Chinese.
evals.expected_output: explanation.md created, fully in Traditional Chinese, with code blocks in English, numbered items, covering major C++ concepts from the project
assertions: explanation.md was created or updated in the project directory
explanation.md prose is predominantly in Traditional Chinese (contains Chinese characters)
Code blocks inside explanation.md are in English (not translated)

evals.prompt: There's a C++ codebase in my project folder with include/ and src/ directories. I want to learn what it does and understand the C++ patterns used. I come from a Java background.
evals.expected_output: explanation.md with Java comparisons for each C++ concept, covers patterns like Singleton, friend classes, pointers vs references
assertions: explanation.md was created or updated in the project directory
At least one explicit comparison to Java is made
STL containers (vector or similar) are explained
